sprint.name: Attribution, Licensing & Open Source Readiness
sprint.goal: Establish proper open-source licensing, clear attribution for all contributors, GitHub repository configuration, and documentation that positions jim.tennis as an adaptable parks league management system while providing a practical on-ramp for other clubs
focus_areas: README overhaul with attribution and project positioning
Contributor guide and club adaptation documentation
In-app credits page with developer profile and CourtHive attribution
